From: Martin, Sara On Behalf Of Kriss, Scott
Sent: Wednesday, October 24, 2007 3:50 PM
Subject: IRS Request for Officers and Leaders List

The IRS is auditing Limited Brands consolidated Federal Income Tax return for the FYE 1/2007. One of their recent initiatives is to review the individual tax returns of the company's executives to ensure consistent treatment of amounts paid to the executive. In response to a request by the IRS, we are informing you that your name will be included on a list of Officers and Business Unit Leaders of Limited Brands for the FYE 1/2007 being provided to the IRS.

If the IRS requests additional information from the company, we will notify you.

In the meantime, please do not hesitate to contact me (614-415-7095) or Kevin Dunn (614-415-7128) if you have any questions.

Scott A. Kriss

Limited Brands

Vice President -Tax

614-415-7095 (Phone)

614-415-7020 (Fax)

SKriss@limitedbrands.com
